summary: BLOCK 73.1 Universal Price Visibility on Dream List - All features tested and working. Backend APIs (10 tests) pass 100%. Frontend UI verified via Playwright screenshots showing price badges correctly displayed on all Dream List cards.

context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 73.1 Universal Price Visibility fully tested. Dream list items now show price badges on all cards: $X for items with cached Discogs pricing (from collection_values collection), '---' placeholder for items without pricing data. Verified on /collection Dream List tab and /profile/{username} Dreaming tab. Treasury Header (BLOCK 72.1), Edition Number pill (BLOCK 73.3) also verified working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_universal_price_visibility.py.

GET /api/iso/dreamlist - returns median_value enrichment for authenticated user (200 OK)
GET /api/valuation/dreamlist - returns total_value for current user
